name: Chocolate Eclairs 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the water and shortening, bringing to a boil until the shortening is melted.
2. Add the flour to form a stiff batter.
3. Gradually add eggs one at a time until well beaten.
4. Shape the batter into two 2-inch ovals and place on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit, then turn down to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Place in the middle rack for 30 minutes. They should fall easily.
7. Do not open the oven until they are golden brown.
8. Cool.
9. Cut open the top and remove the uncooked inside. Fill with Basic vanilla pudding.
10. Mix the sugar and butter, then add whole milk to reach the desired consistency.
